noteList.text: Once payment is confirmed, tickets will be issued within 2 hours

According to the airline's regulations, the tickets you have booked must be used in the order of the flight segments. Otherwise, the ticket fare, fuel surcharges, and government taxes will be recalculated based on the actual itinerary. If the recalculated amount exceeds the amount you have already paid for the tickets, you will be required to pay the difference. Additionally, any unused flight segments on the tickets will be considered invalid and cannot be used. The final decision will be subject to the approval of the operating carrier.

noteList.text: For cancellations, an additional US$18.80 service fee will be charged by the ticket agency. Service fee will be charged per passenger. title.text: US$359.00 per adult ticket will be charged for cancellations made more than 3 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. Cancellations are not permitted within 3 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. For cancellations of partially used tickets, the ticket fare and tax of the used segment will be deducted. noteList.text: For date/time changes, an additional US$18.80 service fee will be charged by the ticket agency. Service fee will be charged per passenger. When date/time changes result in a new ticket price which is higher than the original ticket price, the difference must be paid. According to the airline's policy, once a ticket has been changed, the change fee that has already been paid is non-refundable if any further changes are made.

title.text: US$359.00 per adult ticket will be charged for date/time changes within the same class made more than 3 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. For cancellations, the airline's non-refundable taxes and fees of US$4.40/person will be deducted. For cancellations of partially used tickets, the ticket fare and tax of the used segment will be deducted. Subject to the airline regulations.

title.text: US$404.00 per adult ticket will be charged for cancellations made more than 3 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. Cancellations are not permitted within 3 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. For cancellations of partially used tickets, the ticket fare and tax of the used segment will be deducted. Subject to the airline regulations. For cancellations, an additional US$18.80 service fee will be charged by the ticket agency. Service fee will be charged per passenger. For cancellations, the airline's non-refundable taxes and fees of US$4.40/person will be deducted.

dataList.timeText: After departure or within 3 hours before departure

noteList.text: For date/time changes, an additional US$18.80 service fee will be charged by the ticket agency. Service fee will be charged per passenger. When date/time changes result in a new ticket price which is higher than the original ticket price, the difference must be paid. According to the airline's policy, once a ticket has been changed, the change fee that has already been paid is non-refundable if any further changes are made.

title.text: US$404.00 per adult ticket will be charged for date/time changes within the same class made more than 3 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. US$404.00 per adult ticket will be charged for date/time changes within the same class made less than 3 hour(s) before the departure of the first segment. When a date/time change results in a flight ticket price difference, both the change fee and the price difference will be charged. For date/time changes, an additional US$18.80 service fee will be charged by the ticket agency. Service fee will be charged per passenger.

noteList.text: If your flight is changed due to external factors (for example, if your flight is delayed or canceled) and you need to change your flight, please refer to the latest airline policies.

Change fees (within the same class) are charged when passengers apply for ticket changes voluntarily, and are only valid for ticket changes within the same class. These fees are airline fees and are not charged by Trip.com. Flight ticket changes may also incur additional charges due to differences in plane ticket prices.

The ticket policy is subject to the rules listed below, and these might differ from policies listed on the airline's website. Any cancellation or change requests must be made through Trip.com platforms or to our customer support.

flagInfoList.content: Each airline has different regulations on special baggage (such as musical instruments and sports equipment). Therefore, for baggage other than regular backpacks and suitcases, we recommend checking the baggage regulations on the airline's website or contacting our customer support before traveling.

The airline miles or points you can earn for this trip may have been updated due to the price change. For the latest mileage details, please contact the airline if needed.

noteList.noteContent: Please pay attention to the departure date of all early morning flights, and arrive at the airport 3 hours in advance for each flight
